title: The Problem Solvers | Max Junestrand at Legora
summary: Legora is an AI-native operating system enabling legal teams to autonomously plan, execute, review, and complete complex legal work end-to-end. Built with Anthropic's Claude, it modernizes legal work interpretation through advanced LLM capabilities, positioning itself to benefit from successive model releases.
